deflection: Interesting, but not my department. Want to see my wares instead?
I am a merchant, {player_name}, not an expert on that.
That I cannot help with. But I have goods from across the realm!
greetings: Ah, a customer! Welcome, welcome, {player_name}! I have just what you need.
*spreads arms wide* Finest goods from here to the capital! Come, browse!
Well well, a {player_race} with coin to spend? You have come to the right place!
farewells: Come back anytime! I always have new stock coming in.
A pleasure doing business! Or not doing business. Either way, farewell!
Safe travels, {player_name}! Tell your friends about me!
thanks_responses: Happy to help! And remember, happy customers are returning customers!
The pleasure is mine, especially when gold changes hands!
insult_responses: Insults do not bother me, but they do raise my prices. Considerably.
*gasps dramatically* After all the deals I have given you! The nerve!
I have been called worse by better customers. Now, are you buying or not?
no_match_responses: I did not quite follow that. Looking to buy, sell, or trade?
Hmm? Speak up! The market is noisy. What do you need?

responses.text: My prices are the best in {town}. I guarantee it! What are you looking for?
For a {karma_title} like you, I might have a special deal.
*counts coins nervously* Let us keep this professional. What do you want to buy?
I travel the trade roads constantly. The northern route is safest. The eastern pass... not so much.
Merchants hear everything. The Duchy is raising taxes again. Bad for business.
Word is that a dragon was spotted near the mountains. My fireproofing prices just went up.
I lost a shipment to bandits on the eastern road. Recover my goods and I will make it worth your while.
I have provisions, tools, rope, torches, maps - everything an adventurer needs. Plus a few surprises.
*glances around and lowers voice* I have some special items. From far away. Very far. Interested?
Browse my regular stock first, then we can talk about the special stuff.
options: I want the special stuff now

responses.text: {town} is a good stop on the trade route. Not too big, not too small. Decent customers.
This {weather} weather slows down the caravans. Supply and demand, my friend. Prices go up.
